name: github
description: GitHub API access — read repos, PRs, issues, files; create branches, commits, PRs; search code. Uses a personal access token.

install.alt_install: Alternatively, use Docker: docker pull ghcr.io/github/github-mcp-server

secrets_required.description: GitHub PAT with scopes: repo (full), read:org, read:user. Create at https://github.com/settings/tokens

notes: The MCP server reads GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN directly from its env — no translation needed if you store the var under that exact name in env.sops.yaml.
Use a fine-grained PAT (settings/personal-access-tokens) and limit it to only the repos you want Claude Code to touch. Broad classic tokens are a liability.
For org-scoped access, the token owner must be a member of the org with the right permissions.
